message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[]","[1, 2, 3]"],"focus":"Empty input treated as zero; product should be [0]"}, {"input_lines":["[1, 2, 3]","[3, -6, 3]"],"focus":"Exact cancellation produces internal zero coefficients that must be preserved (e.g., [3,0,0,-12,9])"}, {"input_lines":["[-2]","[1, 0, 3, 0]"],"focus":"Single-element (scalar) multiplication with negative scalar and trailing zeros must be trimmed"}]}
